title: Effects of Salinity on the Reproductive Cycle of the Mangrove Oyster Crassostrea tulipa in Hatchery Conditions
author: Sühnel, Simone
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Aim: Development of hatchery techniques for  Crassostrea gasar  seed supplies, including animal conditioning using salinity manipulation.  A protocol for conditioning using salinity manipulation for  C. gasar  was developed based on review of existing literature and data from previous projects. The protocol was tested and evaluated by university partners in southern Brazil, refined by Embrapa and then transferred to industry partners.
steps_raw: Aim: Development of hatchery techniques for  Crassostrea gasar  seed supplies, including animal conditioning using salinity manipulation.  A protocol for conditioning using salinity manipulation for  C. gasar  was developed based on review of existing literature and data from previous projects. The protocol was tested and evaluated by university partners in southern Brazil, refined by Embrapa and then transferred to industry partners.
